createUserModal.title: Add User
createUserModal.description: Create a new account. You can email an invite, set a password yourself, or generate a temporary one to share.
createUserModal.inviteLabel: Send an email invite to set a password
createUserModal.tempPasswordNote: Shown once after creation. The user must change it on first login.

resetPasswordModal.defaultDescription: A temporary password has been set for {userName}.
resetPasswordModal.notShownAgain: This password will not be shown again.
resetPasswordModal.mustChangeOnLogin: The user will be required to change their password on next login.

toasts.userUpgraded: {name} was upgraded to a full account
toasts.userDowngraded: {name}'s own data was removed; their delegate access remains.

dialogs.promoteMessage: Are you sure you want to promote {name} to {role}?
dialogs.demoteMessage: Are you sure you want to demote {name} to {role}?
dialogs.disableMessage: Are you sure you want to disable {name}? They will be unable to log in.
dialogs.resetMessage: This will generate a new temporary password for {name}. They will be required to change it on next login.
dialogs.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete {name}? This will permanently remove their account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone. If they are a delegate of another account, their own data is removed but their login is kept so the delegation still works -- they become a delegate-only user.
dialogs.tempPasswordDescCreated: A temporary password was generated for {name}. Share it with them to sign in.
dialogs.tempPasswordDescUpgraded: An existing shared user was upgraded to a full account. Share this temporary password with {name}.
